channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download YT Downloader 10.3.1
item.description: YTD Youtube Downloader is an application that reliable and intuitive, allowing you to quickly download YouTube videos and save them to your computer. You can also convert the media files to the format desired video or extract audio streams and save separately. YTD Youtube Downloader lets you save your favorite clips of yourself from Youtube, Facebook, Vimeo and Dailymotion to your desktop. The software supports URLS from many web site hosting, multimedia and allows you to download desired...

item.title: Download VoiceAgent 1.0.21
item.description: Turn your voice into text instantly anywhere on your PC. Voiceagent runs 100% locally, transcribes your voice in real-time and pastes directly at your cursor position. Seamless voice-to-text conversion in just 3 steps. Just tap, speak, and your words appear—no setup, no hassle. Key Features Activate Voiceagent: Press Ctrl+Space + left click to activate. Speak freely and our AI will understand context, punctuation, and technical terms accurately. Text appears instantly: Your words...

item.title: Download Syncovery Premium 11.13.10.180
item.description: Syncovery Pro Enterprise is a great application used to back up data and to synchronize personal computers, servers, laptops, notepads and storage online. item.title: Download SpaceSniffer 2.2.0.27
item.description: SpaceSniffer is a free and portable tool that allows you to understand how folders and files are structured on your drive. Using the intuitive Treemap layout, you can instantly see where large folders and files are located on your device. The Treemap concept was invented by Professor Ben Shneiderman, who kindly gave permission to use his concept in this tool. Start the scan and see the overall situation. The larger the elements in the view, the larger the folders and files on your...

item.title: Download All Dlls Dependencies 2.2.2.1
item.description: All Dlls Dependencies is a free utility designed to allow static analysis of DLL dependencies. It is capable of analyzing modules to find missing imported DLLs or functions. All Dlls Dependencies aims to assist you if you receive an annoying warning that specific DLLs are missing and cannot run your intended application. Sometimes, but not often, restarting the application will help, but more than likely, you will need to install the missing DLL on your machine. This is where this...

item.title: Download Nmap Security Scanner 7.99
item.description: Nmap Security Scanner is a useful utility for network exploration or security testing. Many systems and network administrators also find it useful for tasks such as network inventory, managing service upgrade schedules, and monitoring host or service uptime. Nmap uses raw IP packets in new ways to determine which servers are available on the network, what services (application names and versions) that server is providing, the operating system (and version operating) they are running, the...
